payload.text:
import streamlit as st
import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go

# Judul Aplikasi
st.set_page_config(page_title="App Audit Internal 5R", layout="wide")
st.title("📋 Aplikasi Audit Internal 5R")
st.subheader("Warehouse RM Technical & FG Herbisida")

# Struktur Data Kriteria (Berdasarkan File Anda)
kriteria_5r = {
    "Ringkas": [
        "Area kerja bebas dari item yang tidak dibutuhkan",
        "Prosedur pembuangan barang tidak terpakai sudah ada",
        "Barang di dekat area kerja sesuai kebutuhan",
        "Tidak ada peralatan rusak di area kerja",
        "Lokasi penyimpanan mudah diakses"
    ],
    "Rapih": [
        "Barang disimpan sesuai klasifikasi",
        "Layout tempat kerja memiliki batas jelas",
        "Semua penyimpanan berlabel & identitas",
        "Penyimpanan dokumen memudahkan pencarian",
        "Personil taat aturan layout"
    ],
    "Resik": [
        "Sarana kebersihan tersedia & sesuai jenis",
        "Pembersihan rutin & terjadwal",
        "Area tanggung jawab 5R ditentukan",
        "Alat kerja diperiksa & dibersihkan teratur",
        "Tidak ada tempelan/coretan tidak relevan"
    ],
    "Rawat": [
        "Standarisasi 5R sudah diterapkan",
        "Eliminasi sumber kotor & penyederhanaan proses",
        "Audit 5R dilakukan secara periodik",
        "Sistem sumbang saran/kaizen berjalan",
        "Evaluasi berkala terhadap standar"
    ],
    "Rajin": [
        "Sikap kerja positif & disiplin",
        "Aktif memberikan saran perbaikan",
        "Target/Quality Objective dipahami",
        "Activity board menyajikan info kinerja",
        "Penerapan 5R masuk dalam Job Desc"
    ]
}

# --- FORM INPUT ---
with st.form("audit_form"):
    col1, col2 = st.columns(2)
    with col1:
        auditor = st.text_input("Nama Auditor")
        area = st.selectbox("Area Audit", ["WH RM Technical", "FG Herbisida", "Office"])
    with col2:
        tanggal = st.date_input("Tanggal Audit")

    st.write("---")
    
    # Input Skor
    scores = {}
    for kategori, pertanyaan in kriteria_5r.items():
        st.header(f"R - {kategori}")
        cat_scores = []
        for p in pertanyaan:
            score = st.slider(p, 1, 5, 3, key=p)
            cat_scores.append(score)
        scores[kategori] = sum(cat_scores) / len(cat_scores)
    
    submitted = st.form_submit_button("Simpan & Hitung Hasil")

# --- PROSES HASIL ---
if submitted:
    df_hasil = pd.DataFrame(dict(r=list(scores.values()), theta=list(scores.keys())))
    
    # Menghitung Rata-rata Total
    avg_total = sum(scores.values()) / 5
    
    st.success(f"Audit Selesai! Skor Rata-rata: **{avg_total:.2f}**")

    # Visualisasi Radar Chart
    fig = go.Figure()
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatterpolar(
        r=list(scores.values()) + [list(scores.values())[0]],
        theta=list(scores.keys()) + [list(scores.keys())[0]],
        fill='toself',
        name='Hasil Audit'
    ))

    fig.update_layout(
        polar=dict(radialaxis=dict(visible=True, range=[0, 5])),
        showlegend=True,
        title=f"Visualisasi 5R Performance - {area}"
    )

    st.plotly_chart(fig)
    
    # Simpan ke CSV (Logbook)
    data_log = {
        "Tanggal": [tanggal],
        "Auditor": [auditor],
        "Area": [area],
        **scores,
        "Rata-rata": [avg_total]
    }
    df_log = pd.DataFrame(data_log)
    st.write("Data Pratinjau Log:", df_log)
    
    # Tombol Download
    csv = df_log.to_csv(index=False).encode('utf-8')
    st.download_button("Download Report (.csv)", csv, "report_audit_5r.csv", "text/csv")

**Considering Flash UI Modification**

I'm focusing on adapting the "Flash UI" React/Gemini application. I'm looking at how I can integrate UI component generation leveraging Gemini 3 Flash. I have a Python/Streamlit snippet to inform me on a starting approach.


**Analyzing Streamlit Code**

I've shifted focus to analyzing the provided Streamlit code. It outlines a "5R Internal Audit App" for warehouse assessment, with categories like "Ringkas," "Rapih," and "Resik." I'm identifying the scoring mechanisms, radar chart visualization, and data handling components. The code's structure suggests a direct request to refactor the Flash UI application into a functionally similar audit tool, utilizing its design principles.


**Interpreting User Intent**

I'm now clarifying the user's implicit intent. It seems they desire a migration or re-implementation of the Streamlit app's logic within the React/Gemini framework. This aligns with a transformation that uses "Flash UI" to produce the new application, or to have AI-enhanced capabilities. I'm choosing to interpret the task as a combination of migration and enhancement, focusing on how Flash UI can be used to generate the 5R Audit app with added AI features.


**Defining App Scope**

I'm now defining the scope for the "5R Pro Audit" app. This involves specifying updates to the current app, like branding changes and UI transitions from a 3-grid layout to a multi-step audit form and dashboard. I will integrate the 5 categories with their questions and leverage Gemini to provide insightful reports and plans based on audit scores. I also plan to add a radar chart, keeping the "Immersive" aesthetic.


**Developing App Specifications**

I am now focusing on refining the specifications for the new "5R Pro Audit" application. I am planning to incorporate a dark, premium visual theme with interactive sliders and a glowing radar chart that has animated transitions. I also aim for "Smart Insight" cards with a sparkle effect. It will have a responsive layout, with key technical details that are `index.tsx` for the main logic, `RadarChart.tsx` for the custom SVG-based radar chart, `constants.ts` for 5R criteria, and `index.css` for app styles. Finally, the app will generate a clean downloadable document or JSON report.


**Refining Task Scope**

I've reconsidered the user's implicit instructions. I now believe the goal is to fully pivot the existing Flash UI into a specialized "5R Pro Audit" platform. I’ve outlined the total 25 questions across the 5 categories (5 each) and plan to build a step-by-step wizard to guide users through them. I'll need to update `types.ts`, `constants.ts`, and `index.tsx` to handle the audit workflow, plus add a RadarChart component. I'll use the 'gemini-3-flash-preview' model for generating Smart Analysis, and add a report export feature.

A custom SVG-based radar chart component for visualizing 5R performance.
Complete overhaul of the main application to function as a 5R Internal Audit tool with AI-powered insights.
Update styles for the 5R Audit app, including form wizard, score buttons, radar chart container, and AI insight blocks.
Update app metadata to reflect the new 5R Internal Audit purpose.
